sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, flag BIT, value FLOAT, text_col TEXT);
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, TRUE, NULL, 'example1'), (2, FALSE, 3.5, 'example2'), (3, TRUE, 4.5, NULL);
CREATE TABLE alt_table (group_id INT, reference INT);
SELECT group_id, bool_or(flag) FROM test_table GROUP BY group_id HAVING bool_or(flag) >> 1 IS TRUE;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM alt_table WHERE reference = id) AS link_count FROM test_table WHERE bool_or(flag) IS TRUE;
WITH subquery AS (SELECT id, text_col, flag >> 1 AS shifted_flag FROM test_table) SELECT bool_or(shifted_flag) FROM subquery WHERE text_col IS NOT NULL;
SELECT value, bool_or(flag) FROM test_table WHERE (value IS NOT NULL AND value > 0) GROUP BY value HAVING bool_or(flag) = TRUE;
CREATE TABLE extra_table (a INT, b BIT);
INSERT INTO extra_table VALUES (1, TRUE), (2, FALSE), (3, NULL);
SELECT a, bool_or(b) >> 1 AS shifted_bool FROM extra_table GROUP BY a HAVING (shifted_bool IS TRUE OR shifted_bool IS FALSE);
SELECT id, (flag >> 2) AS shifted_flag FROM test_table WHERE id <= 3 AND value IS NOT NULL;
